message:
fix(diagnostic): validate evidence level before recording entries

Add bounds check in asx_evidence_record() to reject invalid
asx_evidence_level values (outside ASX_EVIDENCE_INFO..ASX_EVIDENCE_FAIL
range) with ASX_E_INVALID_ARGUMENT before they can corrupt sink
counters. Previously, an out-of-range level would silently increment
count and could index into unexpected counter memory.

Includes test_evidence_rejects_invalid_level() verifying that invalid
levels are rejected and no counters are modified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
